fields.help: Single rotating claim code to allow managed members to claim a dummy user account. Cleared when managed is false.
fields.name: claim_code

emailTemplate.subject: Login from a new location
emailTemplate.body:
Hello,

We noticed a login to your {APP_NAME} account from a new location:

{ALERT_INFO}

If this wasn't you, you should immediately change your {APP_NAME} account password to revoke access from all other locations.

If this was you, you may disregard this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

emailTemplate.subject: OTP for {APP_NAME}
emailTemplate.body:
Hello,

Your one-time password is: {OTP}

If you didn't ask for the one-time password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

verificationTemplate.subject: Verify your {APP_NAME} email
verificationTemplate.body:
Hello,

Thank you for joining us at {APP_NAME}.

Click on the button below to verify your email address.

Verify

If you didn't recently register, please ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

resetPasswordTemplate.subject: Reset your {APP_NAME} password
resetPasswordTemplate.body:
Hello,

Click on the button below to reset your password.

Reset password

If you didn't ask to reset your password, please ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

confirmEmailChangeTemplate.subject: Confirm your {APP_NAME} new email address
confirmEmailChangeTemplate.body:
Hello,

Click on the button below to confirm your new email address.

Confirm new email

If you didn't ask to change your email address, please ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

fields.help: Stable id stored on users.avatar. Lowercase letters, digits, underscores. Must never collide with a bundled avatar id (man_1, woman_1, girl_1, girl_2).
fields.name: slug

fields.help: Label shown in the avatar picker.
fields.name: display_name

fields.help: Picker order among remote avatars (bundled ones always come first).
fields.name: sort_order

fields.help: Square PNG, same framing as assets/avatars/*.png.
fields.name: image

fields.help: Empty = general catalog, visible to everyone. Set = only households that redeemed this pack's code see this row.
fields.name: packs

fields.help: Stable id stored on subjects.icon. Must never collide with a bundled character id (dog, cat, plant, bin, fish, generic) or legacy tokens (pets, eco, plant_token, delete, bins, shopping_cart, shopping, home).
fields.name: slug

fields.help: Label shown in the character picker.
fields.name: display_name

fields.help: Picker order among remote characters (bundled ones always come first).
fields.name: sort_order

fields.help: Pastel stage colour as #RRGGBB. The app derives the gradient from it. Bundled examples: dog #FCE3D2, plant #D8F0E2.
fields.name: base_color

fields.help: Default pose - required, every other expression falls back to it.
fields.name: idle

fields.help: Optional - falls back to celebrate then idle.
fields.name: happy

fields.help: Optional - falls back to idle.
fields.name: sad

fields.help: Optional - falls back to happy then idle.
fields.name: celebrate

fields.help: Optional - falls back to idle.
fields.name: sleeping

fields.help: Trophy pose for featured award cards. Optional - cards fall back to idle.
fields.name: award

fields.help: Empty = general catalog, visible to everyone. Set = only households that redeemed this pack's code see this row.
fields.name: packs

fields.help: Stable id stored on households.picture. Must never collide with a bundled picture id (paihia, terrace).
fields.name: slug

fields.help: Label shown in the household picture picker.
fields.name: display_name

fields.help: Picker order among remote pictures (bundled ones always come first).
fields.name: sort_order

fields.help: Time-of-day variant, same framing as assets/households/<id>/morning.png.
fields.name: morning

fields.help: Time-of-day variant.
fields.name: midday

fields.help: Time-of-day variant.
fields.name: afternoon

fields.help: Time-of-day variant.
fields.name: evening

fields.help: Time-of-day variant.
fields.name: night

fields.help: Empty = general catalog, visible to everyone. Set = only households that redeemed this pack's code see this row.
fields.name: packs

fields.help: Id of the chosen household picture (e.g. cottage, barn). Empty = use client-side fallback.
fields.name: picture

fields.help: Single rotating invite code for joining this household. Cleared when invites_open is false.
fields.name: invite_code

fields.help: When true, anyone with the invite_code can join via the join-household-by-code endpoint.
fields.name: invites_open

fields.help: Packs this household has redeemed. Managed by the redeem-pack-code hook; hand-edit here to grant or revoke.
fields.name: packs

name: _authOrigins
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_authOrigins_unique_pairs` ON `_authOrigins` (collectionRef, recordRef, fingerprint)

name: _externalAuths
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_externalAuths_record_provider` ON `_externalAuths` (collectionRef, recordRef, provider)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_externalAuths_collection_provider` ON `_externalAuths` (collectionRef, provider, providerId)

name: household_member_details

fields.help: Single rotating claim code to allow managed members to claim a dummy user account. Cleared when managed is false.
fields.name: user_claim_code

viewQuery:
SELECT
  hm.id        AS id,
  hm.household AS household,
  hm.user      AS user,
  hm.role      AS role,
  hm.created   AS created,
  hm.updated   AS updated,
  u.name       AS user_name,
  u.avatar	   AS user_avatar,
  u.managed	   AS user_managed,
  u.claim_code AS user_claim_code
FROM household_members hm
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = hm.user
